name: 96 Gangster Crips
description: Gangster Crips (or ES 96GC) are an African American street gang formed in the early 1980’s in Los Angeles, California claiming the Gangster Crips and East Side Crips card. Their rivals include the Be-Bopp Watts Bishops, 92 Elm Street Pirus and the 99 Watts Mafia Crips. They are allies of all Gangster Crips.
